narrative:
Parma-05-D (precinct in Cuyahoga County) has 976 registered voters, with 57.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 19.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 23.5%, a modest Democratic lean of 4.4 percentage points.
